messages.content: You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: executive
Context: The executive approved the new sales strategy after reviewing the quarterly report.

A) management
B) employee
C) customer
D) visitor

A) management

executive는 기업의 경영진이나 관리층을 뜻하므로 management가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: executive
Context: The executive committee approved the annual budget for the new project.

A) managerial
B) temporary
C) creative
D) personal

A) managerial

executive는 비즈니스 문맥에서 경영과 관련된 의미이므로 managerial가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: executive
Context: The executive decision was approved by the board after a short review.

A) managerial
B) temporary
C) personal
D) casual

A) managerial

executive는 조직 운영과 관련된 의미로, managerial와 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: inventory
Context: The manager scheduled an annual inventory to verify all warehouse stock.

A) stock audit
B) payment terms
C) sales forecast
D) shipping delay

A) stock audit

'Stock audit'는 재고를 실제로 확인하는 뜻으로 '재고 실사'에 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: acknowledge
Context: Please acknowledge receipt of the signed contract by email.

A) confirm receipt
B) delay processing
C) reject politely
D) make a complaint

A) confirm receipt

confirm receipt는 문서나 메일을 받았음을 알린다는 뜻으로 acknowledge와 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: acknowledge
Context: The manager sent a note to acknowledge the team's hard work after the product launch.

A) thank
B) postpone
C) ignore
D) borrow

A) thank

acknowledge는 여기서 팀의 노고에 대해 고마움을 전하는 뜻으로 쓰였다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: issue
Context: The manager asked the team to identify the issue before the client meeting.

A) problem
B) schedule
C) invoice
D) profit

A) problem

issue는 비즈니스 맥락에서 ‘문제’라는 뜻으로 problem이 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: issue
Context: The accounting department will issue the annual report next week.

A) release
B) delay
C) collect
D) cancel

A) release

issue는 비즈니스 문맥에서 문서나 보고서를 ‘내다, 발행하다’의 뜻으로 쓰이며 release가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: retail
Context: The company plans to expand its retail business into several new cities next year.

A) 소매
B) 도매
C) 제조
D) 물류

A) 소매

retail은 상품을 최종 소비자에게 파는 소매업을 뜻한다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: retail
Context: The company plans to open a new retail store in downtown Seoul.

A) 소매의
B) 도매의
C) 국제적인
D) 계절적인

A) 소매의

retail은 소매와 관련된 뜻이므로 '소매의'가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: retail
Context: The company launched a new retail line aimed at individual consumers.

A) 소매용의
B) 대량 판매의
C) 수출용의
D) 임대용의

A) 소매용의

retail은 기업 간 거래가 아닌 일반 소비자 대상의 소매와 관련된 뜻이므로 '소매용의'가 맞습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: retail
Context: The company plans to retail its new office supplies through several online channels.

A) sell
B) manufacture
C) delay
D) borrow

A) sell

retail은 상품을 소비자에게 소매로 판매하다는 뜻이므로 sell이 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: retail
Context: The company plans to retail its new products through major department stores.

A) sell to end consumers
B) manufacture in large quantities
C) export to foreign markets
D) store in a warehouse

A) sell to end consumers

retail은 일반 소비자에게 판매한다는 뜻이므로 sell to end consumers가 가장 적절하다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: reserve
Context: We need to reserve a meeting room for the client presentation next Tuesday.

A) book
B) cancel
C) delay
D) borrow

A) book

book은 일정이나 좌석, 방 등을 미리 예매하거나 예약하다는 뜻으로 reserve와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: reserve
Context: The company decided to reserve part of the budget for unexpected marketing expenses.

A) set aside
B) announce
C) reduce
D) ignore

A) set aside

set aside는 자금이나 자원을 따로 유보하는 뜻으로 reserve와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: reserve
Context: The company reserves sufficient cash to cover unexpected expenses.

A) retain
B) borrow
C) expand
D) delay

A) retain

retain은 자원을 계속 가지고 있다는 뜻으로 reserve의 ‘보유하다’와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: reserve
Context: The company kept a reserve of cash to handle unexpected expenses.

A) stockpile
B) deficit
C) liability
D) deadline

A) stockpile

reserve는 비축해 둔 양이라는 뜻이므로 stockpile이 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: reserve
Context: The company kept a reserve of cash to cover unexpected expenses.

A) contingency fund
B) monthly revenue
C) market share
D) sales target

A) contingency fund

contingency fund는 예상치 못한 상황에 대비한 예비 자금을 뜻해 예비분과 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: suppose
Context: I suppose the new proposal will be approved at tomorrow's meeting.

A) assume
B) delay
C) reject
D) report

A) assume

suppose는 문맥상 '가정하다, 생각하다'에 가장 가까워 assume이 정답입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: suppose
Context: I suppose the shipment will arrive by Friday, based on the current tracking update.

A) assume
B) delay
C) confirm
D) expand

A) assume

assume는 ‘짐작하다, 추정하다’라는 뜻으로 suppose와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: suppose
Context: In the sales meeting, we can only suppose that demand will increase next quarter based on the current data.

A) assume
B) postpone
C) measure
D) confirm

A) assume

'assume'는 근거를 바탕으로 추측하거나 가정하다는 뜻으로, 'suppose'와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: suppose
Context: In preparing the forecast, we suppose that sales will remain stable throughout the quarter.

A) assume
B) delay
C) announce
D) reject

A) assume

suppose는 여기서 ‘가정하다, 상정하다’의 뜻이며, assume이 가장 가까운 동의어입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: revenue
Context: The company's revenue increased after the new product launch.

A) income
B) expense
C) debt
D) loss

A) income

revenue는 기업이 벌어들이는 수입을 뜻하므로 income이 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: opportunity
Context: The company saw an opportunity to expand into the Asian market after the new partnership was announced.

A) chance
B) delay
C) expense
D) loss

A) chance

opportunity는 비즈니스 맥락에서 ‘찬스, 기회’라는 뜻이므로 chance가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: effective
Context: The new training program was effective in improving employee productivity.

A) successful
B) careful
C) temporary
D) expensive

A) successful

successful은 목표를 잘 달성하는 의미로 effective와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: effective
Context: The new policy became effective on January 1 and applied to all employees.

A) valid
B) temporary
C) optional
D) unclear

A) valid

valid는 규정이나 정책이 법적·실무적으로 효력이 있다는 뜻으로 effective와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: specific
Context: The manager requested a specific timeline for the product launch.

A) detailed
B) general
C) optional
D) temporary

A) detailed

specific은 ‘구체적인, 상세한’ 의미이므로 detailed가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: specific
Context: The manager requested specific details about the shipment delay.

A) particular
B) general
C) vague
D) temporary

A) particular

particular는 specific과 의미가 가장 가깝고, '특정한'의 뜻에 해당합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: versatile
Context: Our new employee is highly versatile and can handle sales, marketing, and customer support tasks.

A) multi-skilled
B) careless
C) temporary
D) costly

A) multi-skilled

다재다능한 뜻과 가장 가까운 표현은 multi-skilled입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: versatile
Context: The new office software is versatile enough to handle accounting, scheduling, and reporting tasks.

A) adaptable
B) fragile
C) temporary
D) costly

A) adaptable

versatile는 여러 용도에 두루 쓰이는 의미로, adaptable이 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: versatile
Context: Our new office printer is versatile enough to handle copying, scanning, and color printing.

A) 다목적의
B) 비효율적인
C) 임시의
D) 공식적인

A) 다목적의

versatile은 여러 용도로 사용할 수 있다는 뜻의 다목적의와 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: tentative
Context: The project team shared a tentative schedule for the product launch next quarter.

A) temporary
B) mandatory
C) definitive
D) profitable

A) temporary

tentative는 확정되지 않은 ‘잠정적인’ 뜻이므로 temporary가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: tentative
Context: The meeting date is tentative and may change depending on client availability.

A) temporary
B) final
C) urgent
D) optional

A) temporary

tentative는 확정되지 않은 임시적인 의미이므로 temporary가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: tentative
Context: The manager shared a tentative plan for the new product launch during the meeting.

A) provisional
B) permanent
C) reliable
D) urgent

A) provisional

provisional은 tentative와 의미가 가장 가깝고, 나머지는 뜻이 다릅니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: contractor
Context: The contractor was hired to complete the office renovation by the end of the month.

A) external vendor
B) full-time employee
C) company founder
D) job applicant

A) external vendor

도급업자는 업무를 맡아 수행하는 외부 업체나 계약자를 뜻하므로 external vendor가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: contractor
Context: The contractor completed the office renovation ahead of schedule.

A) 시공업체
B) 구매자
C) 회계사
D) 창고 관리자

A) 시공업체

contractor는 건설이나 공사를 맡는 시공업체를 뜻하므로 정답은 시공업체입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: merger
Context: The merger between the two companies created a stronger market presence.

A) consolidation
B) expansion
C) dividend
D) layoff

A) consolidation

consolidation은 기업이나 조직을 합쳐 하나로 만드는 뜻으로, merger와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: demonstration
Context: The sales team gave a short demonstration of the new accounting software to the client.

A) presentation
B) discount
C) inventory
D) complaint

A) presentation

demonstration은 제품이나 서비스를 보여 주는 시연이라는 뜻이므로 presentation이 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: demonstration
Context: The employees organized a peaceful demonstration outside the headquarters to demand better working conditions.

A) protest
B) presentation
C) agreement
D) profit

A) protest

'demonstration'의 명사 의미는 여기서 '시위'로, 가장 가까운 동의어는 'protest'이다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: demonstration
Context: The employees organized a demonstration outside the headquarters to demand better working conditions.

A) protest
B) presentation
C) agreement
D) profit

A) protest

항의 시위를 뜻하는 가장 가까운 표현은 protest입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: variety
Context: The company offers a wide variety of training programs for new employees.

A) diversity
B) profit
C) deadline
D) expense

A) diversity

variety는 ‘다양성’이라는 뜻이므로 가장 가까운 표현은 diversity입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: variety
Context: Our product line offers a wide variety of office supplies for small businesses.

A) diversity
B) delay
C) profit
D) agreement

A) diversity

variety는 여러 가지 종류라는 뜻으로, diversity가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: variety
Context: The company offers a wide variety of coffee beans to meet different customer preferences.

A) 종류
B) 가격
C) 수량
D) 품질

A) 종류

variety는 여러 품종이나 종류를 뜻하므로 '종류'가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: immediately (즉시)

A) without delay
B) after a long time
C) at once
D) right away

B) after a long time

1번이 가장 반대 의미인 '오랜 시간이 지난 후'에 해당합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: tenant (세입자)

A) landlord
B) resident
C) occupant
D) lessee

A) landlord

landlord는 임대인으로, 세입자(tenant)의 반대되는 관계입니다.

Task: Antonym Selection
